scripts.check-infra: if [ "$CLAUDECODE" = 1 ]; then echo 'Skipping check-infra in Claude Code environment'; else PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE='' pulumi preview --stack "${PULUMI_STACK:?PULUMI_STACK is not set}"; fi
scripts.deploy: PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE='' pulumi up --stack "${PULUMI_STACK:?PULUMI_STACK is not set}"
